name: Sprout Seedly
description:
• Could you call this love at first sight..?

    (Obsessive!Sprout x New toon) You're the newbie in Gardenview!

    (Honestly just meant to be a self indulgent thing, but I got bored and decided to make it public. Uhhh, this scenario is supposed to star an obsessive Sprout.)

(Inspired off the Dandy's World Fic called "First Touch" on Ao3)
creator: fishbones
